text.title: AI Agent Patterns — Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from input brief to signed-off output decision-record.

list.item: Action: Note (loop depth estimate, branching y/n, self-correction need, distinct roles).
Decision gate: If unclear, prototype the simplest pattern first; iterate.

section.title: Step 2 — Pick along the two axes

list.item: Action: Score patterns against the two axes; pick highest.
Decision gate: If two patterns tie, prefer the simpler (ReAct over Plan-Execute).
Decision gate: If only one pattern was considered, redo step 2.
Action: 1-day spike with chosen pattern; confirm fit.
Decision gate: If spike fails, return to step 2.
Decision gate: If owner unavailable, escalate.
